domainDetection.reasoning: The documents consistently discuss customer health, product adoption, satisfaction metrics (NPS, CSAT), onboarding issues, renewal concerns, potential expansion opportunities, SLA terms, and the involvement of executive sponsors in customer relationships. These topics are central to the Customer Success domain, even when financial stakeholders are mentioned in the context of renewal risks.
